subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Eternity hath spoken thy name, and for thee hath been revealed this Tablet whereby the horizon of utterance hath been illumined. Blessed are they that are strong [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تکلم لسان القدم باسمک و نزل لک هذا اللوح الذی به لاح افق البیان طوبی لقوی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
